entities.name: FUNGAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Communities of fungi inhabiting agricultural soils, affected by climate and management practices

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural management scenarios based on conservation agriculture principles to improve sustainability and yield

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural principles focusing on minimal soil disturbance and organic cover

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: Traditional tillage-based farming practice used as a baseline for comparison

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop used in various rotation scenarios

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop used in all rotation scenarios, with yield measured as a trait

entities.name: MUNGBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop used in partial CSA and CA-based rotation scenarios

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used in specific CSA-based rotation scenarios

entities.name: FERTIGATION
entities.description: The application of fertilizers through an irrigation system

entities.name: FLOOD IRRIGATION
entities.description: A traditional irrigation method where water is pumped or gravity-fed to flood the field

entities.name: SUBSURFACE DRIP IRRIGATION
entities.description: A method of irrigation where water and nutrients are delivered directly to the root zone

entities.name: ILLUMINA PAIRED-END SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing technology used to analyze fungal community composition

entities.name: INTERNAL TRANSCRIBED SPACER REGIONS
entities.description: Genetic regions ITS1 and ITS2 used for the identification and classification of fungi

entities.name: SHANNON DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A measure of fungal species diversity and evenness

entities.name: SIMPSON INDEX
entities.description: A measure of fungal species diversity

entities.name: ASCOMYCOTA
entities.description: The most abundant fungal phylum identified across all scenarios

entities.name: BASIDIOMYCOTA
entities.description: A fungal phylum present in the agricultural soil communities

entities.name: ZYGOMYCOTA
entities.description: A fungal phylum present in the agricultural soil communities

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A chemical property of soil indicating the amount of organic carbon present

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A chemical property of soil indicating the amount of nitrogen present

entities.name: BULK DENSITY
entities.description: A physical property of soil measuring the mass of dry soil per unit volume

entities.name: MEAN WEIGHT DIAMETER
entities.description: A physical property of soil used to assess soil aggregate stability

entities.name: WATER-STABLE AGGREGATES
entities.description: A physical property of soil referring to aggregates that resist breakdown when exposed to water

entities.name: WHEAT GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of wheat grain per unit area

entities.name: SYSTEM YIELD
entities.description: The total productivity of the agri-food system across rotations

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The overall health and sustainability of the soil, influenced by physical, chemical, and biological properties

entities.name: CLIMATE
entities.description: Environmental factor that influences fungal communities in soil

entities.name: WEATHER
entities.description: Short-term atmospheric conditions that influence fungal communities in soil

entities.name: ANTHROPOGENIC ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Human-driven activities and management practices that influence fungal communities in soil
